summary: FIFA World Cup 2026 Round-of-32 radial bracket. D1-backed, server-rendered, A2A-enabled. Designed to be operated agent-to-agent with no human in the loop.

UPDATE_SECRET.purpose: Bearer token gating external POST /api/update. Resolve store_id from the Cloudflare Secrets Store API by name; never paste by hand.

SCORES_SOURCE_URL.purpose: Autonomous ingestion source. The scheduled() cron fetches this URL and applies the returned {matches:[delta]} to D1 — no human, no secret. Point it at any agent-published JSON endpoint (e.g. an A2A peer).

agent_context.note: this document, augmented with live binding presence

match_delta.home_pens: int|null (penalty-shootout goals when a tie went to pens)

channels: cron scheduled() + SCORES_SOURCE_URL — fully autonomous, internal, no auth
POST /api/update with Bearer UPDATE_SECRET — agent-to-agent push
direct D1 write via the Cloudflare D1 API/connector (account+database_id above)

operate_without_human.update_scores: Set SCORES_SOURCE_URL to an agent-published JSON endpoint; the worker self-refreshes on its cron. Or POST deltas to /api/update. Or write fact_match directly via the D1 connector.
operate_without_human.deploy: CI (.github/workflows/wc2026.yml) deploys wc2026-bracket on merge to main. Resolve the Secrets Store store_id from the CF API by name at deploy time.
operate_without_human.migrate: workers/wc2026-bracket/migrations/*.sql, idempotent; apply via the D1 connector or `make migrate-bracket`.
operate_without_human.verify: make bracket-render-test (Chrome Canary, iPhone 16 Pro emulation).
